provenance_residue.label: Provenance residue
provenance_residue.summary: Text leaks assistant, template, formatting, assignment, or publication-workflow residue.

synthetic_significance.label: Synthetic significance
synthetic_significance.summary: Text performs importance, revelation, or depth without enough concrete support.

frictionless_structure.label: Frictionless structure
frictionless_structure.summary: Text is packaged too evenly through headings, lists, repeated shapes, or tidy closures.

generic_abstraction.label: Generic abstraction
generic_abstraction.summary: Text relies on portable abstractions, stock vocabulary, or low-specificity claims.

voice_erasure.label: Voice erasure
voice_erasure.summary: Text loses stance, concrete subjects, asymmetry, or authorial presence.

genre_misfit.label: Genre misfit
genre_misfit.summary: Text uses a device that may be valid in one genre but suspicious in another.

depth_consequence.strong_warning: Fix at Balanced and All unless the user explicitly accepts the risk after disclosure.
depth_consequence.context_warning: Review at Balanced; All requires removal unless the user explicitly accepts the risk.

depth_summary.balanced_strong_or_hard: Hard failures or strong warnings remain; fix or ask user before Balanced depth output.
depth_summary.balanced_context_only: No hard failures or strong warnings; context warnings need user decision.
depth_summary.balanced_clean: No hard failures, strong warnings, or context warnings.
depth_summary.all_failures: One or more checks fail; All depth requires a clean pass unless user explicitly accepts risk.

inline_labels.next_step_prompt: Want me to re-run with --depth all to inspect lower-tier signals?

templates.counts_line: Auto-detected: {auto_flagged} of {auto_total} flagged · Agent-assessed: {agent_flagged} of {agent_total} flagged
templates.severity_line: {hard_fail} hard fail · {strong_warning} strong warning · {context_warning} context warning
templates.brief_note_auto_detected: Checks the script runs against the text directly.
templates.brief_note_agent_assessed: Checks that are judged by an LLM based on reading the whole draft.
templates.signal_stacking_clear: Signal stacking: clear (weaker AI signals are not accumulating)
templates.next_step_prompt_with_full_report: Want the full coverage report, suggestions for edits, a full rewrite, or to save this audit as a file?
templates.next_step_prompt_full_report_mode: Want suggestions for edits, a full rewrite, or to save this audit as a file?
